title: potentilla nivea var. crebridens
intro: Potentilla nivea var. crebridens is a variant of the Potentilla nivea plant, commonly known as the snow gentian or white cinquefoil, which is a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The medicinal properties of Potentilla nivea var. crebridens include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Potentilla nivea var. crebridens can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
